properties.name: app.mail.enabled
properties.description: Set to true (with SPRING_MAIL_HOST configured) to send real emails. When false, all email operations log intent only.

properties.name: app.mail.from
properties.description: Sender address used in outbound emails.

properties.name: app.football.api.enabled
properties.description: Set to true (with football.api.key configured) to enable live match result sync from football-data.org.

properties.name: football.api.key
properties.description: API key for football-data.org. Required when app.football.api.enabled=true.
